items.requestSummary: Move the approved API Portal content into the new Visual Studio React and ASP.NET Core solution.
items.decisionSummary: Migrate the Portal shell, framework dashboard, v0.4.0 guide, Swagger inventory, reporting baseline and governance log. Replace the former Node/Express Portal API with a read-only ASP.NET Core API.
items.validationSummary: Client and server build validation included with the delivery; QADBUtility remains unchanged.

items.requestSummary: Modernise the sidebar search, title icon, active icons, status pill and collapsible groups.
items.decisionSummary: Use an Algolia title icon, right-aligned expanding search, state-coloured source pill, white halo active icons and animated group chevrons in both the Portal shell and hosted guide.
items.validationSummary: Implemented in React CSS/components and in the hosted standalone guide.

items.requestSummary: Integrate QA database and BACPAC management.
items.decisionSummary: Keep the QADBUtility project untouched and disconnected until the Portal baseline is accepted.
items.validationSummary: No QADBUtility source file was modified.

items.requestSummary: Read current framework reports and runtime logs from configurable sources.
items.decisionSummary: Begin with packaged source-validated JSON and later add allowlisted read-only providers with hashes and safe relative identifiers.
items.validationSummary: No local paths, secrets, framework repository or logs are included.

items.requestSummary: Correct the sidebar search icon, modernise section group controls and add working collapse animation.
items.decisionSummary: Use a single always-visible search field with an embedded leading icon and optional clear control. Style group headers as Portal controls with animated chevrons and session-persistent expansion.
items.validationSummary: Covered by React build, lint, static DOM assertions and manual rendered-reference comparison.

items.requestSummary: Review framework evidence in detail and expand the React Guide with accurate operating, security, validation, reporting and coverage content.
items.decisionSummary: Expand to nineteen sections using the bundled v0.4.0 report, automation inventory, public API inventory, Swagger inventory and established framework contracts. Include explicit release caveats and recommendations.
items.validationSummary: Counts and percentages are generated from the bundled JSON evidence; no fabricated runtime results are introduced.
